description: 3D 기반의 온라인 멀티서버 확장성을 지닌 .io 스타일 웹 슈팅 게임
rules_and_constraints: Language: HTML, CSS, Vanilla JavaScript only

Scale Constraint: 3D map bounds are massive (-6000 to +6000). Visual objects like items should have large physical scales (e.g. radius 200) to be visible over the high player speed (multiplier 50) and far camera offset (z-distance 200).

features.name: Game State Management
features.details: Handles seamless transition between LOBBY (Spectator mode), PLAYING (Spawn), and DEAD states without halting the webgl rendering loop.

features.name: Player RPG & Upgrade System
features.details: Manages player XP, leveling up, and dynamic multipliers for 6 core stats (Speed, Agility, Damage, HP, Fire Rate, Bullet Speed).

features.name: Item System
features.details: Spawns massive glowing red orbs (radius 200) yielding random XP on collision, self-destructing after 60s.

features.name: Dynamic UI Components
features.details: Modular injection of Lobby, Death Screen, Leaderboard, Upgrade Menu, and Live Stats Monitor.

features.name: Engine Trail VFX
features.details: Spawns fading spherical particles behind the spaceship using localized engineHardpoints mimicking real thrust effects. Dynamically shifts color and size on boost.

future_goals: Refining visual design of DOM UI components
